scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev -w packages/server" "npm run dev -w packages/web"
scripts.build: npm run build -w packages/server && npm run build -w packages/web
scripts.test:e2e: node -e "if(!process.env.LIVE_BASE_URL){console.error('Set LIVE_BASE_URL explicitly for live Playwright runs.');process.exit(1)}" && playwright test
scripts.test:e2e:live: node -e "if(!process.env.LIVE_BASE_URL){console.error('Set LIVE_BASE_URL explicitly for live Playwright runs.');process.exit(1)}" && playwright test
